[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 11/19 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Aris (Maid)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 11/19 (Tue) After Maintenance – 12/3 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
